calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

Off Calendar May-27-2026 Continued To Jul-08-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Continued To May-27-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated November 24, 2015, is admitted to probate. Barbara Simon is appointed as the Administrator with will annexed with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for April 28, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
